title: pyrethrum vulgare
intro: Pyrethrum vulgare, also known as the common pyrethrum or simply pyrethrum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant contains pyrethrin, a natural insecticide that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of pyrethrum vulgare include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of pyrethrum vulgare include teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from minor wounds to more serious conditions.
